title: v1.0.75 — Massive Update
description: Welcome to AcademicPulse v1.0.75! This is the biggest release yet — a comprehensive bug-fix sweep, data repair engine, and Question Bank overhaul that resolves every known issue and makes the app faster and more reliable than ever.
features:
🗂️ Question Bank — Complete Overhaul
Renamed & Streamlined: The 'Workout' section has been officially renamed to Question Bank and stripped down to what matters — building and managing your question database. The 'Start Workout' drill tab, stat boxes (Total Questions / CSEB / ACCA / Workouts Done) and the dashboard image have all been removed for a cleaner, faster interface.

🛠️ Deep Bug Fix: Stale DOM References
Removed 9 stale JavaScript references to deleted HTML elements (drillSetupScreen, drillActiveScreen, drillResultsScreen, wbWorkoutsDone, drillCourseSelect, drillSubjectSelect, drillTapHint, drillActionBtns, drillProgressBar) that were causing silent crashes and preventing the Question Bank list from rendering correctly.

🔄 Multi-Stage Data Migration Engine
V3 — Retroactive Topic Merging: Automatically merged pre-existing duplicate cards from the same chapter into unified Master Topic Cards (e.g., separate Kaplan and BPP cards for IFRS 16 Leases merged into one clean Mixed card).

V4 — Answer Ref Repair: Fixed merged Mixed cards whose BPP answer references were incorrectly preserved as 'custom text' due to a regex mismatch on a missing closing parenthesis. All affected cards have been automatically repaired.

🧹 Cleaner Question Bank Cards
Ref Text Removed: The verbose [Kaplan] Ref: Q2, Q51... reference lines have been removed from card bodies. Source bank information is now shown exclusively as compact, colour-coded gold badges in the card header.

Source Filter Fixed: Filtering by Kaplan or BPP now correctly surfaces Mixed cross-bank cards that contain references from that source.

📢 Automatic Update Popups
The What's New modal now automatically appears once per version for every user. No more missing important updates — the system stores the last-seen version locally and shows the popup on first launch of each new release.

⚡ Performance Improvements
O(1) Card Indexing: Replaced O(n²) indexOf scan with a pre-built Map lookup for card numbering, making rendering instant regardless of how many cards you have.
